abilities.name: Collective Focus
abilities.description: Rank Value +8: Treat as equal to Condition value. Does not add Rank to Defense.

abilities.name: Armored Swarm
abilities.description: No Wounds; damage reduces Rank Value by 1 (blast reduces by damage-1 min 1). Destroyed at 0.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Swarm of Steel Claws (Pneumatic) | AV: 4 (varies) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Tome Exploding: Lower Rank Value by 1, all within p2 suffer 2 damage. Mask Carry Away: After, move Walk speed, place target adjacent.
(0) Skitter Apart | Break into Steam Arachnids equal to Rank Value; each suffers 2 unreducible damage.
system.notes: Merged collective of Steam Arachnids functioning as single entity. Health via Rank Value Condition. Blasts deal reduced damage. Immune to disengagement.
